idea-plugin.name: IDEswitcher
idea-plugin.description:
IDEswitcher — Jump from IntelliJ IDEA to your AI editor while preserving cursor position and file context.

Switch between editors seamlessly with ⌥⇧O (Option+Shift+O). Configure your preferred target editor (Qoder, CodeFuse, Cursor, Windsurf, or Trae) in Settings → Tools → IDEswitcher.

Features:

  • Quick jump from IntelliJ to your configured editor with ⌥⇧O
  • Preserves file path and cursor position (line, column)
  • Configurable default target editor (Qoder / CodeFuse / Cursor / Windsurf / Trae)
  • Supports opening both projects and specific files

Currently macOS only. Contributions for Linux/Windows support are welcome!
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.3.0

  • Add Cursor, Windsurf, and Trae as jump target options
  • Settings now supports 5 editor targets with auto-detection

1.2.0

  • Add CodeFuse as a jump target option
  • Add Settings → Tools → IDEswitcher page to switch the default target (Qoder / CodeFuse)
  • Remove unused URL scheme fallback (CLI path only)

1.0.0 — Initial release

  • Quick jump from IntelliJ to Qoder with ⌥⇧O (Mac)
  • Preserves file path and cursor position (line, column)
  • Supports opening both project and specific files

action.description: Open current project/file in the configured target editor (Qoder, CodeFuse, Cursor, Windsurf, or Trae)
